'''Min K'atel''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and the leader of [[Belasco/Legends|Belasco]]. His daughter, [[Joli K'atel|Joli]], was affected by the bacterium created by [[Jenna Zan Arbor]]. [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] and [[Adi Gallia/Legends|Adi Gallia]] looked into the case of the contaminated [[Water/Legends|water]] to find Zan Arbor. Min did not allow the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] to annoy the [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Uta S'orn]] neither to get into the palace to investigate. Finally, they discovered that S'orn was allied with Zan Arbor.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Dangerous Rescue]]'' {{1st}}
